assertions.description: PICO1_D+/PICO1_D- and PICO2_D+/PICO2_D- are correctly identified as differential pairs with ESD protection attributed to the Pi Pico (U1, U2) internal protection.
The board is a purely passive passthrough adapter. Zero bus protocols detected is correct. 17 components + 56 no-connects reflect the heavily unconnected nature of the design.
